caption: A digital screen displays a dark mode terminal window filled with lines of white and green system log text. The logs contain timestamps, IP addresses, and HTTP requests, including phrases like "GET /homepage HTTP/1.1 404 444" and "GET /favicon.ico HTTP/1.1 404 444". The text describes server events, mentioning "Apache2" and "HTTP Server". In the upper right corner, a date and time are visible as "Oct 28 00:21". A footer at the bottom of the window contains the text "e-pyauth" alongside a small blue and white logo. The image is a composite of four identical frames, showing a static screen of text without any movement, changes in content, or people present. The layout remains constant across the entire sequence, depicting a fixed view of technical log data.
